signUpIncomplete: We couldn’t finish creating your account. Go back, check your details, and try again. If this keeps happening, contact support.
inviteExpired: This invite has expired. Request a new one.
inviteEmailMismatch: This email doesn’t match the invited address.
form_identifier_not_found: No account found with this email.
form_password_pwned: This password is known to be unsafe. Choose another.
form_param_nil: Please fill in all required fields.
captcha_invalid: Security check failed. Refresh the page and try again.
captcha_missing_token: Security check incomplete. Refresh the page and try again.
user_locked: Your account is temporarily locked. Try again later or contact support.
